center.name: 皮拉茹 (巴西)
center.summary: 皮拉茹 (巴西)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Rufous casiornis、Pale-breasted spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale-breasted spinetail (Synallaxis albescens) is a passerine bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Costa Rica, Panama, Trinidad, and in every mainland South American country except Chile and Ecuador.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous casiornis (Casiornis rufus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, Uruguay, and as a vagrant to Chile.Remsen, J
